title: Example Progress Update
text:
Figures
Figures saved to reports/figures/ are accessible via the figures/ symlink at the Quarto project root. Reference them with paths relative to this file:
![Caption](../figures/my-plot.png)
Or generate them inline using code chunks:
```{r}
#| label: fig-example
#| fig-cap: "Example figure caption"
# plot(x, y)
```
```{python}
#| label: fig-example
#| fig-cap: "Example figure caption"
# import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
# plt.plot(x, y)
```
